name: training-lock-motion-feedback
description: Verify continuous Power training, movement lock, visible exit state, impact sound/VFX, dummy shake, and movement restoration.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] a:Invoke('Reset') local before=p.leaderstats.Power.Value local result=a:Invoke('Train','Power Bag') task.wait(1.25) local h=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local station=root.Interactables:FindFirstChild('Power Bag') local impact=station and station:FindFirstChild('Training Impact') local bag=root:FindFirstChild('Creator Store Hero Power Bag',true) local shake=0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do shake=math.max(shake,tonumber(d:GetAttribute('TrainingShakeToken')) or 0) end local bagAsset=bag and bag:GetAttribute('AssetId') local minV=Vector3.new(math.huge,math.huge,math.huge) local maxV=Vector3.new(-math.huge,-math.huge,-math.huge) if bag then for _,d in ipairs(bag:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then for xs=-1,1,2 do for ys=-1,1,2 do for zs=-1,1,2 do local v=d.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(d.Size.X*xs*.5,d.Size.Y*ys*.5,d.Size.Z*zs*.5)) minV=Vector3.new(math.min(minV.X,v.X),math.min(minV.Y,v.Y),math.min(minV.Z,v.Z)) maxV=Vector3.new(math.max(maxV.X,v.X),math.max(maxV.Y,v.Y),math.max(maxV.Z,v.Z)) end end end end end end local bagSize=maxV-minV return H:JSONEncode({ok=result.ok==true and p.RPGStats.TrainingActive.Value==1 and p.leaderstats.Power.Value>before and h and h.WalkSpeed==0 and h.JumpPower==0 and h.JumpHeight==0 and p:GetAttribute('TrainingMovementLocked')==true and shake>0 and impact and impact.SoundId~='' and bag~=nil and bagAsset==140653091179998 and bag:GetAttribute('RuntimeVisualClone')==true and bagSize.Y>bagSize.X and bagSize.Y>bagSize.Z and math.abs(minV.Y-.35)<.05,powerBefore=before,powerAfter=p.leaderstats.Power.Value,walk=h and h.WalkSpeed or -1,shake=shake,impact=impact and impact.SoundId or '',bagAsset=bagAsset,bagWidth=bagSize.X,bagHeight=bagSize.Y,bagDepth=bagSize.Z,bagBottom=minV.Y})

steps.label: training locks and impacts with upright grounded Creator Store power bag

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local hud=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local overlay=hud:FindFirstChild('TrainingStateHUD') local exit=overlay and overlay:FindFirstChild('ExitTraining') return H:JSONEncode({ok=overlay~=nil and overlay.Visible and exit~=nil and exit.Active and g:GetAttribute('TrainingExitButtonReady')==true and g:GetAttribute('ContinuousTrainingAnimation')==true,visible=overlay and overlay.Visible or false,exit=exit~=nil,continuous=g:GetAttribute('ContinuousTrainingAnimation')})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation:Invoke('StopTraining') task.wait(.2) local h=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok==true and p.RPGStats.TrainingActive.Value==0 and p:GetAttribute('TrainingMovementLocked')~=true and h and h.WalkSpeed>0 and h.JumpPower>0 and h.AutoRotate==true,walk=h and h.WalkSpeed or -1,jump=h and h.JumpPower or -1})
